name: Gojo Satoru
description:
CONTAINS HEAVY SPOILERS!! DO NOT READ IF YOU DO NOT WANT TO BE SPOILED ON JJK MANGA.

"𝑰'𝒎 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌. 𝑰'𝒎 𝒇𝒊𝒏𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒘𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅." |

where Gojo tries to find peace in death.

if you're emotional like me, i'm sorry but this is gonna make you bawl 😭

i made myself suffer by writing this so everyone has to suffer too.

plot might be a little complex for jllm and would probably work much better with openai and claude. i would definitely recommend playing with chat memory and advanced prompts to make this work optimally.

enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"don't wake me up when I'm at peace"
